positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of intertwined mystical elements: a celestial moon phase, flowing cosmic nebula structures, geometrically stylized mandalas, and graceful bioluminescent fauna (like manta rays and stylized deep-sea flora). The artwork should utilize extreme black and white contrast, reminiscent of graphic woodcuts and stylized tattoo flash art. Focus on clean, bold linework, strong silhouette definition, and a centralized, circular composition. Use dot work and fine etching details for texture variation. The overall aesthetic should be cosmic occult and modern mystical, suitable for apparel print.
negative: low resolution, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, blurry, artifacts, text, signatures, watermark, gradient, photorealism, sketch, messy lines, extra limbs
